title: Note - Heaven’s Reach Grand Elder
body:
Hope decays for our continued way of peace.

The heretical forsaken cast into the pit has somehow survived, scurrying through the bowels of the ancient tombs like a grave leech picking at corpses.

Their rummaging led to the incidental awakening of some ancient mechanism, tearing the ground open like a gateway to hell. When our flock ventured into the depths of the maw, the horrible truth was discovered… we have been abandoned.

We will no longer stand for this. We will breach these subterranean halls to retake control of these lands.
